story.text: > The needle that pierces the same point forty-two times does not merely make a hole; it weaves a knot so tight that the wind itself cannot find a way through.
Tier **dragon** · Stratum 6/6 · Hex `3F` · 3 nodes · 42 laps · undefined spells cast · charge **inferno**

**Significance.** A 3-node masterclass in compression. 42 laps create a drilling effect — a point of sovereignty so hot it blinds surveillance through sheer velocity. Minimal constellation, maximum temporal density.
